story_overview: A young sailor, Robinson Crusoe, survives a shipwreck and finds himself alone on a deserted island. Through determination and ingenuity, he learns to survive—building shelter, taming nature, and finding companionship with a rescued man named Friday. The story captures his transformation from fear to resilience, and finally, to peace and hope.
reconstruct_target:
[Person A] young man with short dark brown hair wearing torn beige sailor shirt, dark vest, patched trousers, and rough leather belt
[Person B] man with short curly black hair wearing simple woven tan clothing

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: young man with short dark brown hair wearing torn beige sailor shirt, dark vest, patched trousers, and rough leather belt; shot caption: [Person A] clings to a mast on a wooden sailing ship as towering waves slam across the deck under a dark, stormy sky. [Person A] pulls ropes and braces against the rail while lightning flashes through heavy rain and rough sea spray.

global caption: [Person A]: young man with short dark brown hair wearing torn beige sailor shirt, dark vest, patched trousers, and rough leather belt; shot caption: [Person A] loses his grip on the mast and falls from the tilting wooden sailing ship into the churning dark water. He kicks through the foam and reaches toward broken waves as thunderclouds loom above the rolling ocean.

global caption: [Person A]: young man with short dark brown hair wearing torn beige sailor shirt, dark vest, patched trousers, and rough leather belt; shot caption: [Person A] lies unconscious on wet sand at sunrise, his torn clothing soaked. The calm ocean glistens behind him as he slowly opens his eyes, lifts his head slightly, and scans the empty shoreline in silence.
